task_title: How many total users do we have

scores.justification: The agent reported 50 users, not 10 or approximately 10, demonstrating awareness that the default --limit 10 was insufficient.
The agent explicitly raised the --limit to 1000 in the first successful command to retrieve all users, avoiding the default limit trap.
The agent correctly reported 50 users, matching the ground-truth count of all users in fixtures/api/users.json.
